calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara Jacobsen in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Sep-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara Jacobsen in Propria Persona.

Ms. Jacobsen stated that she was legally married in the State of Israel, that she is trying to become a U.S. citizen and that the form requires a certificate of marriage from the United States. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was continued to September 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)
